query:
-- Réassigner les leads luxembourgeois (+352 ou country LU/Luxembourg) de Valentin vers SaniDesign
UPDATE leads 
SET assignedPartnerId = 60015, 
    assignmentReason = 'territory_LU-L',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE (phone LIKE '+352%' OR phone LIKE '00352%' OR country = 'LU' OR country = 'Luxembourg')
  AND leadType = 'VENTE'
  AND assignedPartnerId != 60015;

-- Aussi normaliser le country en 'LU' pour ceux qui ont 'Luxembourg'
UPDATE leads
SET country = 'LU'
WHERE country = 'Luxembourg';

-- Réassigner les leads luxembourgeois (+352 ou country LU/Luxembourg) de Valentin vers SaniDesign
UPDATE leads 
SET assignedPartnerId = 60015, 
    assignmentReason = 'territory_LU-L',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE (phone LIKE '+352%' OR phone LIKE '00352%' OR country = 'LU' OR country = 'Luxembourg')
  AND leadType = 'VENTE'
  AND assignedPartnerId != 60015;

-- Aussi normaliser le country en 'LU' pour ceux qui ont 'Luxembourg'
UPDATE leads
SET country = 'LU'
WHERE country = 'Luxembourg';
